title: Through the Fire and Flames Collab
description:
It's here! After months and months it's finally ready... the first full-length DragonForce YTPMV collab!

I was rather happy with the Math Party collab but because of my mediocre management as a host (it was my first collab after all) and the song choice (it was cool but still an easy chiptune with nothing too unique to it) I never was completely satisfied with it. I learned from my mistakes and decided to host another one (which will be my last) using a more challenging song which managed to bring up everyone's creativity.

I'm really, really happy with this collab, everyone has done a great job and even if some parts were a little rushed (due to last moment dropouts) everything sounds great, which is what matters, after all.

TL;DR: http://puu.sh/lBNwX/5f2fdefb71.png (thanks omni)

And now for the collab members:

1.Me: This part is VERY old and gay... Hardo Gay to be exact
http://youtube.com/MrSpazzaneve17
2.Aidan: my b
https://www.youtube.com/TriforceOfDiarrhea
3.Marcelo: La pinga es tu mejor medicina si te pones mal llama nos te pondremos calmante altoque nomas ps
https://www.youtube.com/marcelozcanarioa
4.Gurchik: слава украине
https://www.youtube.com/MrGurchik
5.Jab: Xarlable please leave a comment down below saying that you liked my part, I used all your favorite sources
https://www.youtube.com/MyJabmorenoBroke
6.Soul Strike: I did it in 2 days, WHY THE FUCK PEOPLE DELAY THE COLLAB?!?!?!???
https://www.youtube.com/soulstrike2205
7.Leo: I love Tuba-kun
https://www.youtube.com/LEOriginal037
8.Omni: Bring the money immediately
https://www.youtube.com/omniputance
9.Mirror: making this part brought back anger problems from my childhood (thanks guitar hero)
https://www.youtube.com/mirrorimage98
10.King: A big thanks to Marco for inviting me! This part was really a challenge for me, i thought that The "Devil Horns" move of Cerebella from Skullgirls was a great "song-source combo"
https://www.youtube.com/TheKingOFKings69611
11.Jakob: I AM GRUUT
https://www.youtube.com/OHMYItsGODzilla
12.Robyn: The best song idea for a collab yet, good job Marco! ((Basket Case is the best source!!!))
https://www.youtube.com/RobGBA
13.Raphael: nice epic
https://www.youtube.com/raphaelgoulart
14.numb: i'm sorry i'm undertale trash now, guys
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCV6m0FpvKLcMJRW97G42lYA
15.LENNOZ: $$ peace out yo $$
https://www.youtube.com/MrLenoz1
16.ROB: I kinda went with a cheesy look with all the samples having dumb transitions. Also I hate myself for using Strike Witches, but it kinda fit maybe????
https://www.youtube.com/TheEpicROB
17.Aluminum: I only suck physically
https://www.youtube.com/AIuminum
18.Senji: I'm not dead. I promise.
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIHiaW0aBQfYc7gOLvHvTdA
19.Ketal: A big thank you to Spazza for inviting me to my first international collab.
https://www.youtube.com/ketalmv
20.Carl: Here is a teaser for the upcoming album release of the newest power metal band out there: Edy and the Locodols! STAY TUNED.............
